stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs.
substantive: She opposes the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines.
justification: In political debates, she regularly emphasises the benefits of her political positions for society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs. She opposes the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines. In political debates, she regularly emphasises the benefits of her political positions for society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
